rules.pattern: %a , %# 2-34569 force correct position of numeric indicator
%a . %# 256-34569 force correct position of numeric indicator
%[^_~]%<* be [BFJKMPQVWXZbfjkmpqvwxz][BFJKMPQVWXZbfjkmpqvwxz] = "be" is not the first syllable
- cchildren ![AEIOUYaeiouy] 14-16-1345 edge case for test word
- cchn ![AEIOUYaeiouy] 14-14-125-1345 edge case for test word
%[^_~]%<* pre [Aa] = default case for prea- words
%[^_~]%<* reall [AEIOUaeiou] = reallege reallocate but not really
%[^_~]%<* re [Aa][Ss][CKPSTckpst] = reascend reask reaspire reassure reastonish
^|!%a there - 5-2346 a little more general than sufword
^|!%a those ^|!%a 45-1456 In practice, only the word "those" uses the sign
